evidence.claim: The fixture is invalid before repair.

assumptions.statement: The fixture is synthetic and owned.

unknowns: Future schema revisions may add checks.

critiques.concern: A local repair could be incomplete.
critiques.response: Replay and schema verification cover coupled state.

instance.decision: Apply the minimal repair and replay verification.
instance.expectedOutcome: The repaired fixture passes every declared invariant.
limitations: This result covers only the synthetic fixture.

instance.title: Verified Agentic Work Trajectories

allowed: Deterministic synthetic tasks and RAPPterverse-owned schemas.
excluded: External corpora, private logs, personal data, and secrets.

generation.method: Deterministic synthetic task generation followed by replay verification.

intendedUses: Research on inspectable, replayable agent work.

knownRisks: Public generated data may enter future training corpora.

contamination.guidance: Disclose use and avoid unseen-evaluation claims.

limitations: Synthetic tasks do not represent every production environment.

maintenance.removalProcess: Record removals in a superseding catalog notice.
